---
title: "Replication Log - Agerton et al. (2017)"
author: "Doan Nguyen"
date: "2026-07-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(fixest)
```


```{r load-data}
state_df <- read_dta("data/raw/state.dta")
glimpse(state_df)
```



```{r check}
summary(state_df$rigs_land)
summary(state_df$ces_emp_sa)
```
